stats.title: Data Repatriation Impact

faq.title: Data Repatriation FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about data and workload repatriation with the Metacloud

items.question: Can we repatriate without re-architecting applications?
items.answer: Yes. Elemento treats repatriation as a policy and placement decision. Workloads move between providers while governance and operational models stay consistent.

items.question: How do we move workloads from US to EU providers?
items.answer: Atomosphere orchestrates placement across regions and providers. Electros enforces residency and jurisdiction policies throughout the migration.

items.question: Can we move from public Cloud back to on-premises?
items.answer: Atomosquare and AtomOS provide the on-premises target. Migration preserves governance rather than requiring a new operational stack.

items.question: What triggers a repatriation plan?
items.answer: Regulatory changes, geopolitical shifts, cost optimisation, or internal sovereignty policies. Elemento lets you react with a plan instead of a re-engineering project.

ctaFinal.title: Ready for Data Repatriation?
ctaFinal.subtitle: React to regulatory and geopolitical change with a repatriation plan, not a rebuild.

faq.title: FAQ Repatriazione dati
faq.subtitle: Domande frequenti sulla repatriazione di dati e workload con il Metacloud

items.question: Possiamo repatriare senza re-architettare le applicazioni?
items.answer: Sì. Elemento tratta la repatriazione come decisione di placement. I workload si spostano mantenendo modelli operativi coerenti.

items.question: Come spostiamo workload da provider US a EU?
items.answer: Atomosphere orchestra il placement tra regioni e provider. Electros applica policy di residenza e giurisdizione.

items.question: Possiamo tornare da Cloud pubblico a on-premises?
items.answer: Atomosquare e AtomOS forniscono il target on-premises preservando la governance.

items.question: Cosa attiva un piano di repatriazione?
items.answer: Cambiamenti normativi, geopolitici, costi o policy interne. Elemento ti permette di reagire con un piano.

ctaFinal.title: Pronto per Repatriazione dati?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Reagisci ai cambiamenti normativi e geopolitici con un piano di repatriazione, non una ricostruzione.

items.title: Perte de gouvernance

items.title: Complexité US ↔ EU
items.description: Basculer entre fournisseurs US et EU implique des modèles opérationnels incompatibles.

faq.title: FAQ Rapatriement des données
faq.subtitle: Questions fréquentes sur le rapatriement de données et charges avec le Metacloud

items.question: Peut-on rapatrier sans ré-architecturer les applications ?
items.answer: Oui. Elemento traite le rapatriement comme une décision de placement. Les charges se déplacent avec des modèles opérationnels cohérents.

items.question: Comment déplacer des charges de fournisseurs US vers EU ?
items.answer: Atomosphere orchestre le placement entre régions et fournisseurs. Electros applique résidence et juridiction.

items.question: Peut-on revenir du Cloud public vers on-premises ?
items.answer: Atomosquare et AtomOS fournissent la cible on-premises en préservant la gouvernance.

items.question: Qu'est-ce qui déclenche un plan de rapatriement ?
items.answer: Changements réglementaires, géopolitiques, coûts ou politiques internes. Elemento permet de réagir avec un plan.

ctaFinal.title: Prêt pour Rapatriement des données ?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Réagissez aux changements réglementaires et géopolitiques avec un plan de rapatriement, pas une reconstruction.
